domain_skills.skill_name: Use Case and User Story Development

technical_skills.skill_name: Microsoft Excel Advanced (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, Macros)

ai_exposure_detail: ChatGPT and Copilot in Word assist in drafting BRDs, user stories, and requirements documents from meeting notes and workshop outputs. Notion AI helps structure knowledge bases, process documentation, and sprint backlogs. AI tools accelerate gap analysis by synthesising large volumes of process data and interview transcripts.
human_value_tasks: Business analysts facilitate requirements workshops, build trust with business stakeholders, and translate ambiguous organisational needs into precise documented requirements — tasks requiring interpersonal skills and contextual business understanding AI cannot replicate. They navigate conflicting stakeholder priorities and broker consensus on scope decisions that impact delivery timelines. Sign-off on requirements has legal and contractual implications that require human accountability.

technical_skills.skill_name: Microsoft Excel Advanced (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, Macros)

ai_exposure_detail: ChatGPT and Perplexity AI are extensively used by management trainees for rapid market research, competitive benchmarking, and synthesising industry reports for leadership presentations. Copilot in Word accelerates report writing and summarisation of large documents during rotational assignments. AI tools help trainees produce professional-grade deliverables faster across unfamiliar functional areas.
human_value_tasks: Management trainees build cross-functional relationships and develop contextual understanding of how different departments interact — insights gained only through direct observation and participation, not AI-assisted research. They apply critical thinking to real organisational problems with incomplete information, learning to balance data with judgement under the guidance of senior mentors. Leadership development and behavioural assessment are inherently human-driven processes.

technical_skills.skill_name: Microsoft Excel Advanced (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, Macros)

ai_exposure_detail: Copilot in Excel and Power BI Copilot automate routine MIS reporting, variance analysis, and operational dashboards, reducing manual data collation time. ChatGPT assists in drafting SOPs, operational circulars, and escalation reports. AI-powered operations platforms increasingly automate queue management and scheduling optimisation in large operations centres.
human_value_tasks: Operations executives manage real-time exceptions — system failures, staffing gaps, customer escalations — that require immediate judgement and on-ground authority AI cannot provide. They build team discipline, resolve interpersonal conflicts, and maintain morale in high-pressure operational environments. Identifying systemic operational inefficiencies requires contextual observation and cross-team coordination beyond what data analysis alone reveals.

human_value_tasks: Project coordinators manage the interpersonal dynamics of project teams — resolving conflicts, building commitment, and influencing without authority across functions. They make real-time scope and priority adjustments when resource constraints, stakeholder changes, or technical issues arise, requiring contextual judgement. AI tools assist in synthesising analyst reports, earnings call transcripts, and news into structured strategy briefs. Copilot in Excel automates financial modelling for scenario analysis and business case construction.
human_value_tasks: Strategy analysts develop original insights by connecting disparate information sources and applying lateral thinking to identify non-obvious strategic opportunities — a uniquely human creative capability. They engage with senior leadership to understand strategic intent, organisational constraints, and political dynamics that shape which strategies are actually feasible. Recommendations require human accountability since wrong strategic choices have organisation-wide financial consequences.

human_value_tasks: Process improvement analysts facilitate kaizen events and workshop sessions where change adoption depends on building trust and buy-in from front-line workers and supervisors — requiring facilitation skills and human empathy. They diagnose the behavioural and cultural root causes of process failures that go beyond what data analysis reveals. Implementation of improvement recommendations requires sustained change management and stakeholder engagement that AI cannot drive.

human_value_tasks: Supply chain executives negotiate with suppliers on pricing, lead times, and payment terms — requiring relationship management and commercial judgement that AI cannot perform. They manage supply disruptions, source alternate vendors, and make make-or-buy decisions under time pressure where speed and human judgment are critical. human_value_tasks: Logistics coordinators manage real-time shipment exceptions — delays, customs holds, damage claims, and carrier failures — requiring rapid problem-solving and vendor negotiation under time pressure. domain_skills.skill_name: ERP Data Migration Planning and Execution

ai_exposure_detail: ChatGPT and Copilot in Word accelerate documentation of business process blueprints, functional design documents, and user training materials. AI tools assist in generating test scripts for UAT and mapping legacy data fields to new ERP structures. AI is increasingly used to analyse ERP implementation risks and suggest mitigation approaches based on historical project patterns.
human_value_tasks: ERP implementation consultants navigate the political and cultural dynamics of organisational change, managing resistance from business users and reconciling conflicting departmental requirements. They make configuration decisions that balance standard ERP functionality with specific business needs, requiring deep functional expertise and judgement. Post-go-live hyper-care support — stabilising operations and resolving business-critical issues — requires on-site presence and rapid human problem-solving.

domain_skills.skill_name: PMO Setup and Operating Model Design

ai_exposure_detail: ChatGPT and Notion AI assist programme coordinators in generating programme status reports, risk dashboards, and steering committee presentations from project data. Copilot in Word accelerates drafting of programme charters, governance frameworks, and escalation documents. AI tools are used to analyse resource utilisation patterns and flag at-risk workstreams.
human_value_tasks: Programme coordinators manage the political complexity of multi-project environments where competing priorities, shared resources, and conflicting stakeholder interests require continuous human negotiation and influence. They build cross-project team cohesion and manage dependency risks that require regular human coordination across workstream leads.
